essence: Keeps homes, businesses, and infrastructure alive by mastering the flow of power.

identity.title: Electrician
identity.summary: Installs, maintains, and repairs electrical systems in homes, businesses, and industrial environments with precision and safety.

salary.notes: Self‑employed electricians often earn significantly more. Emergency call‑outs and specialised industrial work can push earnings above £70k.

lifestyle.description: Electricians live a practical, hands‑on lifestyle built around problem‑solving and physical skill. Days often involve travelling between jobs, diagnosing faults, installing wiring, or ensuring systems meet strict safety standards. The work can be physically demanding - crawling through tight spaces, working at height, or handling heavy equipment - and the responsibility is high because mistakes can be dangerous. But the satisfaction is real: fixing something essential, restoring power, or completing a clean installation brings a strong sense of craftsmanship. Many electricians enjoy the independence of the job, the variety of environments, and the steady demand for their skills.
